cast.name: Alessandro Juliani
cast.character: Guitar Player in Final Paris Scene

cast.name: Natasha Morley
cast.character: Girl with Red Sweater at Airport

plot outline: Alex is boarding a plane to France on a school trip, when he suddenly gets a premonition that the plane will explode. Shortly after Alex, a group of students, and his teacher are thrown off the plane, to their horror, the plane does in fact explode. Alex must now work out Death's plan, as each of the survivors falls victim. Whilst trying to prevent the next death, Alex must also dodge the FBI, who believe that he caused the explosion.
title: Final Destination

other companies.name: Alliance of Canadian Cinema, Television and Radio Artists (ACTRA)
International Alliance of Theatrical Stage Employees (IATSE)
